ddls:
CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the television network */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the network */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the network is based */,
  "hq_city" TEXT /* City of the network's headquarters */,
  "hq_country" TEXT /* Country of the network's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_shows" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id", "show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the show */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the show */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the show */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the show */,
  "aired_date" TEXT /* Date the show was aired */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary of the show */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Length of the show in minutes */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company responsible for the show */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Creator of the show */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., airing, canceled) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show that the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number of the episode */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number within the season */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Air date of the episode */,
  "writer" TEXT /* Writer of the episode */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the episode */,
  "plot" TEXT /* Brief summary of the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credits" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit entry */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show the actor/crew is in */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor/crew */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Character name played by the actor (if applicable) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the actor/crew (e.g., actor, writer, director) */,
  "credit_type" TEXT /* Type of credit (e.g., main cast, guest star, crew) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the crew (e.g., writing, directing, camera) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credits_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewership" (
  "viewership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewership record */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show being viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date of the viewership record */,
  "viewer_count" INTEGER /* Number of viewers for the show on that date */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the show on that date */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the show was viewed (e.g., TV, online) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Device type used to view the show (e.g., TV, computer, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewership_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airings" (
  "airing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airing record */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show being aired */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Date of the airing */,
  "air_time" TEXT /* Time of the airing */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network airing the show */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airings_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airings_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, content manager, marketing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show being rated */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., IMDb, Rotten Tomatoes) */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)
